title: The next era of AI coding
summary: Michael Truell (Cursor CEO) describes the evolution of software engineering toward autonomous agent-driven development. He reports that 30% of Cursor pull requests are fully agent-developed, enterprise code AI-generated content rose from 15% to 75% in a year, and agents are increasingly handling parallel tasks with minimal human oversight.
